answers: Start with a cheap practice drone ($50-100), learn basic controls, then upgrade to camera drone for aerial photography.
Beginner drones: DJI Mini 4K (~$300) is excellent — under 250g (no registration needed in many countries), great camera.
Flying tips: start in open areas, no wind, practice hovering first, learn orientation, and always keep line of sight.
Drone rules: check local regulations, register if required, don't fly near airports, over people, or above 400 feet.
